name: Farm to People
text_content:
Company Overview

Farm to People is a New York City-based grocery delivery platform connecting local farms directly to consumers through a proprietary logistics and technology model. The platform offers pantry staples, prepared foods, animal proteins, baked goods, and private label products, delivered within 24 hours, 7 days a week in reusable totes.

Source

Introduced via Elly Truesdell (New Fare Partners) through the Nic Jammet / Quentin connection.

Financial Highlights

2025 Gross Revenue: $23M+ (grew over 100% YoY)
2026 Current Run Rate: $40M+
2025 Delivered Profit Margin: 32%
2025 EBITDA Margin: 11%
Capital Raised to Date: $0 (bootstrapped)

Deal Proposal

Lead: New Fare Partners — $1.5M–$2.5M check
Pre-money Valuation: $40M
Target Ownership: ~3.5%–5.5%
Status: Term Sheet signed (as of March 5, 2026)

Committed Investors

Fred Wilson (first investor in Twitter, Etsy, Coinbase, Foursquare)
Todd Lachman (Sovos Brands)
Williamson Family (Forager Project)
David Barber
Jon Rosen (WME)

Notes

SPV opportunity potentially available for Kinship Ventures
Elly open to setting up a direct call with founder Michael

name: Ruth AI
text_content:
Contact Name: Valerie Chapman
Email: valerie@ruthapp.ai
Company: Ruth AI
Role/Title: Co-Founder / Founder
LinkedIn/Website: 
Situation Summary:
Valerie Chapman, co-founder of Ruth AI, reached out regarding their seed round raise and is seeking a call with Kinship Ventures. Jenny responded directing her to complete the Kinship Intake Form for review. 
Relevant Context:
Ruth AI is building AI agents focused on helping women close the gender wage gap (salary negotiation, personal branding, career advancement).
Claims 7M+ organic views in 2026.
Mentions inbound enterprise/partnership interest from Canva, Reddit, and The Female Quotient.
Founder published a Fortune piece on the $1.6T AI gender gap after a conversation with Sam Altman.
Based in San Francisco, CA.
Action Needed:
Await completion of Kinship Intake Form and pitch deck submission; review for alignment with Kinship’s consumer wellness and women-focused investment thesis. Follow up if qualified for intro call.

name: Amit Vaishnav, Arihafoods Private Limited
text_content:
Contact Name: Amit Vaishnav
Email: investor.arihafoods@gmail.com
Company: Arihafoods Private Limited
Role/Title: Co-Founder
LinkedIn/Website: Not provided (no link included in thread)
Situation Summary:
Amit Vaishnav is pitching Arihafoods Private Limited as a high-agency investment opportunity aligned with Kinship Ventures’ thesis, currently raising ₹3 Cr at a ₹15 Cr valuation.
Relevant Context:
Low glycemic index breads fortified with prebiotic fiber; positioned in health & wellness infrastructure.
Claims 100+ field trials showing positive blood glucose impact; patents filed for 30-day shelf-life via advanced baking + MAP technology.
Reported ₹1.3 Cr FY25 revenue; ₹12–13L monthly sales run-rate; fully bootstrapped.
GTM strategy: D2C + healthcare institutions + Café/QSR expansion.
Moj Office responded requesting completion of Kinship Intake Form before review.

name: XHealth
text_content:
Contact Name: Benyamin Amlashi 
Email: benyamin.amlashi@gmail.com 
Company: XHealth 
Role/Title: Founder & CEO 
LinkedIn/Website: Not found / not provided
Situation Summary:
Benyamin Amlashi reached out to introduce XHealth, an AI-powered digital health and care startup in early formation in Armenia, and requested a review with the goal of exploring potential collaboration. 
Relevant Context:
Founder has 15+ years of experience studying, working, and living in Armenia 
XHealth targets elderly users, pregnant women, and patients with chronic conditions 
Product is a 24/7 AI-powered app with physician support and medical chat 
Includes health monitoring, high-risk condition detection, SOS ambulance dispatch, and weekly PDF health reports 
Startup is currently in research, design, and early implementation phase 
Action Needed:
Log this inbound pitch in ClickUp and determine whether to schedule a brief intro call or request the one-pager for internal review before responding.

name: Jabin Beverage Co.
text_content:
Contact Name: Homayoon Ershadi
Email: homayoon@drinkjabin.com
Company: Jabin Beverage Co.
Role/Title: Founder
LinkedIn/Website:   (LinkedIn not found)
Situation Summary:
Founder of a Persian-inspired CPG beverage brand followed up via email after an IG DM to introduce Drink Jabin and request a conversation and product sampling.
Relevant Context:
Left the tech industry to start a beverage company rooted in Persian heritage.
Product is based on Sekanjabin, a traditional Persian drink.
Emphasizes clean-label ingredients: real fruits and herbs, no synthetics.
Targeting health-conscious U.S. consumers.
Open to sending product samples and scheduling a conversation.
Action Needed:
Review fit for Kinship/Trolley network and decide whether to accept intro call and product sample.

name: Calexo
text_content:
Contact Name: Sekou Foley
Email: sekou@calexo.ai
Company: Calexo
Role/Title: Co-Founder & CEO
LinkedIn/Website: Not provided (not found in email)
Situation Summary:
Sekou Foley reached out to introduce Calexo, an AI-enabled holding company focused on acquiring and transforming legacy service businesses, and requested a brief introductory call to discuss their AI-driven roll-up strategy. 
Relevant Context:
Calexo is pursuing an AI-enabled roll-up strategy, starting with HVAC services.
Initial proof point includes a proprietary AI customer service agent that reduces ticket handling and support costs.
Broader expansion vision spans facilities services, logistics, insurance brokerages, and IT services.
Founding team has strong institutional and technical backgrounds (Apollo PE, Blackstone PE, Google, Meta, CD&R, MIT CS).
Action Needed:
Add to ClickUp and determine whether to accept a short intro call to assess strategic fit and potential next steps.

name: Namier Capital
text_content:
Contact Name: Tej Rathor
Email: trathor@namiercapital.com
Company: Namier Capital
Role/Title: Senior Associate
LinkedIn/Website:  
Situation Summary:
Tej Rathor of Namier Capital followed up with Kinship Ventures after previously sharing multiple consumer, beauty, and wellness investment opportunities, seeking feedback or interest in reviewing materials.
Relevant Context:
Outreach is part of a broader investor–operator introduction effort; initial contact made in November 2025.
Moj Mahdara indicated no time for a call but willingness to review decks and data rooms.
Tej subsequently shared multiple investment opportunities across Food & Beverage, Beauty, and Health/Wellness.
Opportunities include UK- and US-scaling brands with active raises (Seed to Series A).
Latest email (Jan 15, 2026) is a follow-up asking if there is interest in learning more about any of the shared companies.
Action Needed:
Log this thread in ClickUp and determine whether Kinship wants to review any specific decks or formally decline; send a brief response to Tej acknowledging status or next steps.

name: Weare Better
text_content:
Contact Name: Phoebe Walker
Email: phoebe@weare-better.com
Company: Better (brand name inferred from domain; legal entity not specified)
Role/Title: Founder & CEO
LinkedIn/Website: ❗Not provided
Situation Summary:
Phoebe Walker reached out to Kinship Ventures to introduce a non-toxic women’s underwear startup addressing reproductive health risks from toxins in conventional intimates, and requested a brief introductory call.
Relevant Context:
Targeting hidden toxins in women’s underwear (PFAS, microplastics, heavy metals, endocrine disruptors).
Positioning the brand as a category-disrupting, non-toxic alternative in a $45B global market.
Prototypes are being finalized; company is pre-scale and seeking the right partner.
Looking for support on production scale, go-to-market strategy, and category education.
Explicitly identified Kinship Ventures as a strong strategic fit.
Action Needed:
Decide whether to add to pipeline and respond to schedule an initial exploratory call.

name: Phia
text_content:
Attaching our deck here and sharing a quick highlight below.

UPDATED DATE: 03/30/2026
Phoebe Gates 
Mar 24, 2026, 9:51 AM (6 days ago) 
to Moj, Sophia, Trina, GP, me, Jessica 
Hi Moj, 
It was so great connecting a couple weeks ago. Really enjoyed learning more about what you are building at Kinship, the portfolio is incredibly impressive. 
Wanted to circle back as we're nearing the end of our strategic allocation and would love to have you and GP participate if there's interest on your end. Let me know if there's anything else you need from us, happy to send over whatever would be helpful. 
Warmly, 
Phoebe

Contact Name: Phoebe Gates
Email: phoebe@phia.com
Company: Phia
Role/Title: Co-founder (title not explicitly stated in email)
LinkedIn/Website:   (LinkedIn not provided)
Situation Summary:
Phoebe Gates reached out to Kinship Ventures to explore a strategic angel investment from Gwyneth Paltrow in Phia, following the close of Phia’s $30M Series A at a $180M valuation.
Relevant Context:
Phia is a fashion discovery platform and personalized AI shopping agent targeting Gen Z and millennial women.
Recently closed a $30M Series A led by Notable, Khosla Ventures, and Kleiner Perkins.
Currently allocating remaining strategic checks with no minimum check size, prioritizing culturally aligned investors.
Highlights strong traction: 900K downloads, 87%+ monthly retention, $13M/month GMV, $1M+/month revenue, already profitable.
Positioning Gwyneth Paltrow as a culturally aligned investor whose style resonates strongly with Phia’s user base.
Action Needed:
Review the attached deck and determine whether to introduce or explore Gwyneth Paltrow as a strategic angel investor; decide on next-step call or follow-up with Phoebe.

name: Patrick Drake; Autonomy Foods
text_content:
📌 Meeting Context Snapshot
Contact Name: Patrick Drake
Email: patrick@autonomyfoods.com
Company: Autonomy Foods
Role/Title: Founder / Operator (title not explicitly stated)
LinkedIn/Website:  
Situation Summary:
Patrick Drake of Autonomy Foods is in active discussions with Kinship Ventures regarding a potential strategic investment as part of an open capital raise. He is proposing a mid-January catch-up now that he is back in Los Angeles and has shared recent traction and press to support the conversation.
Relevant Context:
Autonomy Foods positions itself as the “Nespresso of wellness,” offering superfood coffee and matcha products.
Recent partnerships include Nobu, Proper Hotels, 1 Hotel, Aero Jets, Alo, and Goop Health.
Patrick has been on a roadshow onboarding new partners and recently circulated a press release about major hospitality launches.
Moj Mahdara requested additional information and suggested a Zoom or in-person meeting depending on travel.
Internal request from Briell Huddleston to log this in ClickUp for Moj’s review and approval has been acknowledged by Moj’s office.
Action Needed:
Add this interaction to ClickUp and coordinate with Moj Mahdara to approve and schedule a mid-January meeting (Zoom or in-person) with Patrick Drake to evaluate strategic investment fit.


CRM Contact: 
Co-founder of HelloFresh and is now building his latest venture Autonomy - a coffee matcha replacement product
Steph Simon made the intro and Patrick suggested meeting in person as he is also LA based

name: Brian Hogan
text_content:
Contact Name: Brian Hogan
Email: brian@domesquad.com
Company: Dome Squad / 444 Gemini SPV, LLC
Role/Title: Partner / Manager (Investment SPV Lead)
LinkedIn/Website: domesquad.com
Situation Summary:
Moj requested a call with Brian Hogan to clarify unresolved issues related to Kinship 3.0 LLC’s investment in Gemini via the 444 Gemini SPV. LPs are dissatisfied with the information provided, and Moj seeks to determine how to close out the position without incurring additional costs. Scheduling is underway for early October 2025.
Relevant Context:
Kinship Ventures invested $1M (25% of total) into 444 Gemini SPV, which in turn invested in Newflow Amity Fund I, LP, leading to an indirect stake in Gemini Space Station (GEMI).
The Gemini IPO launched at $28/share (valuation: $3.3B market cap, $5.3B enterprise value), now trading near $24/share post-IPO.
Kinship’s estimated holding: ~35,714 shares, valued around $860K–$1M depending on post-lockup pricing.
The SPV has no management fees or carry, with expenses capped at 2% (~$80K).
180-day IPO lockup remains in effect; distributions (cash or stock) to LPs are pending clarification from Newflow Amity Partners.

name: Francis Henri
text_content:
Email received 10/3/25 to RM cc talk to moj

Hi Moj & Gwyneth!

I hope you've both had a lovely week. I've recently been introduced to Kinship Ventures - I'm so incredibly impressed with everything you've built throughout your career, Moj, and of course all things goop! What an impressive duo to join forces. I'd love to introduce myself and my business in the hopes of opening a partnership conversation.

My name is Katherine, and I own Francis Henri, a company with overwhelming potential to be a leader in the next wave of retail in a market that is massively overlooked here in the United States - kids. 

Currently, we are a multibrand children's retail company with a focus on children's clothing - dressing kiddos from newborn to 6 with all the best international brands that are tricky to find in the United States. We carry a sprinkling of accessories, toys, decor and many drops of magic that enhance those special years of early childhood. We reach customers anywhere they'd like to find us - an e-commerce store, two brick & mortar stores, via social, buy online/pick up in store and the occasional traveling pop up.

I have a big dream to grow Francis Henri to retail locations in key markets all over the U.S., owning the early childhood retail experience at a national level. We'll encompass clothing, home goods, bath & body, shoes, toys, play. In addition, the Francis Henri brand lends itself to so much more - hospitality, entertainment, collaborations, private label, etc.! My goal is to find the right partners to help make this big dream happen, and Kinship seems like such an incredible match. For transparency, I also sent our deck to Amy at G9, who I know is a personal friend and another incredible investor! 

HERE will find a deck with all kinds of details about our business. It would be wonderful to continue our conversation, as there's so much more to cover in the world of Francis Henri than a couple of slides can do justice. 

I so appreciate your time, and truly hope we're able to connect.

Enjoy your weekend! 
Katherine

Katherine Oyer
Founder, Francis Henri
Modern shops for little ones, featuring the very best European, Australian, UK & International baby brands that are tricky to find stateside.

Based in Westfield, NJ
www.francishenri.com

Let's be friends! 
IG @shopfrancishenri
Pinterest @shopfrancishenri

Currently, we are a multibrand children's retail company with a focus on children's clothing - dressing kiddos from newborn to 6 with all the best international brands that are tricky to find in the United States. We carry a sprinkling of accessories, toys, decor and many drops of magic that enhance those special years of early childhood. We reach customers anywhere they'd like to find us - an e-commerce store, two brick & mortar stores, via social, buy online/pick up in store and the occasional traveling pop up.

I have a big dream to grow Francis Henri to retail locations in key markets all over the U.S., owning the early childhood retail experience at a national level. We'll encompass clothing, home goods, bath & body, shoes, toys, play. In addition, the Francis Henri brand lends itself to so much more - hospitality, entertainment, collaborations, private label, etc.! My goal is to find the right partners to help make this big dream happen, and Kinship seems like such an incredible match. For transparency, I also sent our deck to Amy at G9, who I know is a personal friend and another incredible investor! 

HERE will find a deck with all kinds of details about our business. It would be wonderful to continue our conversation, as there's so much more to cover in the world of Francis Henri than a couple of slides can do justice. 

I so appreciate your time, and truly hope we're able to connect.

Enjoy your weekend! 
Katherine

Katherine Oyer
Founder, Francis Henri
Modern shops for little ones, featuring the very best European, Australian, UK & International baby brands that are tricky to find stateside.

Based in Westfield, NJ
www.francishenri.com

Let's be friends! 
IG @shopfrancishenri
Pinterest @shopfrancishenri

name: Ron Robinson
text_content:
Quick Reference Profile
Ron Robinson – Founder & CEO, BeautyStat
 ✨ Former Estée Lauder, Avon, and Revlon chemist; recognized for pioneering Vitamin C stabilization in skincare.
 🧴 Founder of BeautyStat, scaling from cult DTC brand into major retail (Ulta, Sephora, QVC).
 🎙 Media voice on science-based beauty, founder resilience, and consumer trust.
 💍 Recently married (Sept 2025); hosted LA welcome party.
 🌎 Balances credibility as a chemist-founder with authenticity as a consumer-facing entrepreneur.
Ron Robinson
Personal & Career Background:
Highly regarded for bridging hard science + beauty storytelling.
Entrepreneurial operator who has personally steered BeautyStat through rebrand, category expansion, and retail growth.
Current Updates / Recent Moves (last 90 days):
Personal: Wedding + honeymoon in early Sept; resumed schedule end of Sept.
Business:
Feb 2025 rebrand repositioned BeautyStat around “Brightenaging” (Marie Claire).
New launches (May–July 2025): C Lip Serum SPF 30, Sunrise Glow Duo; new shade expansions.
Celebrity visibility: Hailey Bieber and Bethenny Frankel boosting Universal C Skin Refiner.
Event thought leadership: Slated to speak at Beauty Accelerate 2025 on science-based beauty.
Press traction: Forbes, People, Marie Claire, Page Six — mix of glowing endorsements and skeptical reviews (helpful to note for board risk/opportunity framing).
Relationship Touchpoints:
Moj + Ron had paused summer comms due to personal/workload; reconvening now.
Moj congratulated on wedding milestone; rapport reinforced with Sept 5 LA invite.
This board call doubles as catch-up + strategic alignment.

name: BeautyStat Cosmetics
text_content:
Moj is a Board Member + Seed Investor 
Intuition Capital invested in there seed round in 2022
Last meeting 


BeautyStat Cosmetics is a science-backed skincare brand founded by cosmetic chemist Ron Robinson (formerly of Estée Lauder, Clinique, and Revlon).
It’s best known for its Universal C Skin Refiner, a patented stabilized vitamin C serum that stays potent and effective over time. The brand focuses on clean, clinically tested formulas with proven results — fragrance-free, paraben-free, and designed for all skin types.
Product lineup includes:
Vitamin C serum (flagship)
Moisturizers & squalane essence
Microbiome purifying masks
Cleansers and treatments
Overall, BeautyStat is praised for combining chemistry expertise with clean beauty and visible results.

name: Founder Inquiry - Spooli
text_content:
Dear Moj,

I’m in the very early stages of building spoolli, a niche photo-sharing and marketplace app for the home sewing community. It’s a passionate, tight-knit, and high-value market that is overlooked by investors. The community (majority women) includes people who sew for sustainability, plus-size makers seeking more control over their style, and non-binary folk tailoring clothes to their own bodies and aesthetics.
So far, I’ve secured the website domain, social handles, and started creating app mockups. I would love to share more with you and hear your perspective on how best to grow and fund this idea.

Richelle
+1-631-678-7020
description:

I’m in the very early stages of building spoolli, a niche photo-sharing and marketplace app for the home sewing community. The community (majority women) includes people who sew for sustainability, plus-size makers seeking more control over their style, and non-binary folk tailoring clothes to their own bodies and aesthetics.
So far, I’ve secured the website domain, social handles, and started creating app mockups. I would love to share more with you and hear your perspective on how best to grow and fund this idea.

Richelle
+1-631-678-7020

name: Gemini
text_content:
Gemini is a global Cryptocurrency exchange
One of the companies that Moj is an investor under Kinship LLC
Below are the quarterly updates on Gemini.

Investor Updates

2025
Q2
Gemini Investor Update

Confidential – Please Do Not Forward or Share

Gemini successfully completed its IPO last week, pricing at $28/share and debuting on NASDAQ under the ticker GEMI. The listing reflects a $3.3B market cap and $5.3B enterprise value, positioning the company as one of the most closely watched public offerings in the sector this year.

Kinship Ventures participated in Gemini through our $1M commitment to 444 Gemini SPV, LLC (25% of the vehicle). Based on the IPO reference price, our investment is expected to translate into approximately 35,714 shares, equivalent to ~1x invested capital pre-expenses. Final allocations will be confirmed once Newflow provides official distributions.

As of market close on Friday, September 19, GEMI traded at $24.14/share, implying a mark-to-market value of roughly $861K for our position. While near-term value is subject to market volatility and a 180-day IPO lockup, the company has reiterated that any appreciation above IPO pricing will be immediately accretive once shares are released.

Importantly, the structure of this SPV remains favorable to investors:

• No management fee or carry at either the Amity Fund or SPV level.
• Expenses capped at 2% of committed capital (Kinship prepaid 1% at entry, which will be credited back).
• Any cost savings below the 2% cap will be proportionally returned to LPs.

Looking ahead, Newflow has indicated their historic bias is to distribute as soon as practicable post-lockup, with the option for LPs to elect cash or shares. Our intent is to forward proceeds promptly once we confirm receipt.

Gemini's filings are publicly available via the SEC (S-1), and the Depository Trust Company (DTC) will serve as custodian for public shares. We will continue to provide updates as allocation, expense, and distribution details are finalized.

Thank you for your continued support. Please keep this information strictly confidential.

— Kinship Ventures

Hey Jeff, Briell here, I work with Moj on managing our LPs. 
What we're trying to work on here is that it looks like there's a loss. We have expenses on our side, both in filing and there will be distribution expenses. 
Can someone join from your side that oversees finance so that we can talk through the following: 
Distribution expenses. 
Timing. 
Waterfall 

Thank you so much. We are heads down on taxes today. Looking forward to getting to know you better. 
I've heard great things about you. 
Briell
